companies.slogan_tagline: AI platform purpose-built for better marketing outputs & outcomes

founders.name: Dave Rogenmoser
founders.biography: Entrepreneur and marketer by trade. Y Combinator alum who previously co-founded Proof, a startup that used algorithms to customize websites. Led Jasper from launch to unicorn status. Stepped down as CEO in September 2023, remaining as Chairman.

founders.name: J.P. Morgan
founders.biography: Background in business-to-business marketing and process automation. Helped co-launch Proof before founding Jasper.

founders.name: Chris Hull
founders.biography: Background in business-to-business marketing and process automation. Helped co-launch Proof before founding Jasper.

companies.headquarters: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York, NY
companies.slogan_tagline: Your AI. Your Rules. - Controllable Visual AI for Enterprise

founders.name: Dr. Yair Adato
founders.biography: PhD in Computer Science (Computer Vision) from Ben-Gurion University in collaboration with Harvard University. Former CTO of Trax Retail where he helped transform the company from an early-stage startup to unicorn status with ~1,000 employees. Holder of 60+ patents at the intersection of AI and commercial applications. Visionary in Computer Vision and Generative AI.

founders.name: Gal Jacobi
founders.biography: Co-founded Bria with Dr. Yair Adato in 2020. Works alongside the CEO to build the Responsible and Open Generative AI Platform.

key_products: API Platform for image generation and editing

founders.name: Clément Delangue
founders.biography: French entrepreneur from La Bassée, France. Started as one of France's top eBay sellers at age 17. Master's from ESCP Business School with programs at Stanford and IIM Bangalore. Previously worked at Moodstocks (acquired by Google) and Mention. Forbes 30 Under 30 Europe 2017. Named one of Top 100 Most Influential French People by Vanity Fair 2021.

founders.name: Julien Chaumond
founders.biography: French entrepreneur and engineer. Met Clément Delangue in 2016 and shared passion for open technology. College friend of Thomas Wolf.

founders.name: Thomas Wolf
founders.biography: PhD in Physics. Machine learning researcher and author of research papers. Leads open-source and science teams at Hugging Face.

companies.slogan_tagline: Reimagine the content lifecycle - Personalized Marketing AI Platform for Enterprises

founders.name: Abhay Parasnis
founders.biography: Former CTO of Adobe (2015-2022). Led Adobe's transformation to cloud and AI-powered experiences with Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, and Experience Cloud. Previously held leadership roles at Microsoft, Oracle, and i2 Technologies. Founded Typeface in 2022 after recognizing the need for enterprise-ready generative AI solutions for marketing.

key_products: Arc AI Agents (Ideation, Creative, Workflow, Performance)
Image Studio for AI product photography

companies.slogan_tagline: Making video easy for everyone - Create engaging videos in minutes

founders.name: Victor Riparbelli
founders.biography: Danish entrepreneur. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Business Informatics from University of Copenhagen. Stanford attendance. Named to TIME100 AI 2024 list. Previously involved in technology entrepreneurship for 10+ years, including co-founding Coincall (crypto portfolio tracker, sold 2019). A 30 Under 30 alum.

founders.name: Steffen Tjerrild
founders.biography: Danish entrepreneur. Master's in Applied Economics & Finance from Copenhagen Business School. Previously worked in sales and business roles before moving into startups. Oversees operations, finance and global scaling at Synthesia.

founders.name: Prof. Matthias Niessner
founders.biography: Professor and AI researcher. Expert in computer vision and deep learning. Published research on AI video generation. Formerly at Technical University of Munich (TUM).

founders.name: Prof. Lourdes Agapito
founders.biography: Professor and AI researcher from University College London (UCL). Expert in computer vision and 3D reconstruction. Published research on AI video generation.

companies.latest_funding_round: Series E - $200M (October 2025) at $4B valuation, led by GV (Google Ventures)

excluded_companies.reason: Funding below $50M threshold ($25M total, acquired by Wix in May 2025)
Unfunded or undisclosed funding below threshold
Unknown funding, likely below threshold (focused on AI writing, not video)
Acquired by Panopto (October 2024), undisclosed funding likely below threshold

research_metadata.criteria: Companies with >$50M total funding in GenAI video space
